title: Check for empty buildTime in version
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add a guard to make sure the the buildInfo variable from the make process is not blank.  This will cause a segv if it is blank and ParseInt tries to do it's thing.

At least partially addresses: #1106

Also added a fix few fixes to Wrapf calls with missing variables so it can pass recent go vetting changes in go 1.11

comments.body: This is failing the Go 1.11 tests with the same gofmt error as #1103 yesterday.
@rhatdan, if this is green, please merge it as it should solve our CI test issues.

:pushpin: Commit 0795485 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 07954853e0f075647bbad40d7f33df5bb6b35f13 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
